original_image_tags: A handwritten, lined notebook page. The paper is aged, with torn edges and two hole-punch marks at the top. There are some handwritten annotations in the margins and at the bottom, including what appears to be a date stamp "JUL 14 1950" and some initials. The main text is written in blue ink with several spelling errors.

elements.description: A handwritten letter on lined paper addressed to the F.B.I., dated July 20/50, discussing a 'flying saucer' incident. Includes handwritten text throughout, a red 'RECORDED - 108' stamp at the bottom, and some faint handwritten annotations in the margins.

judge.reason: The two descriptions are about fundamentally different visual content: one describes a notebook page with hole-punches and a date stamp, while the other describes a letter to the F.B.I. with a different date and a red 'RECORDED' stamp.
